doctrine: Hybrid: SoftDent desktop app is the source of truth for period financial totals (you can get all correct data there).

Database / ODBC / Sensei / sd_* is faster for operational detail when populated — use it for patients/procedures/claims/payments, not as primary period-close until it matches desktop Register side-by-side.

Desktop Excel path: click Excel prompt → Enter → Setup → keep SoftDent Select File Name folder (NEVER type SoftDentReportExports / C:\SOFTDE~1 there) → SoftDent saves → NR2 copies to C:\SoftDentReportExports and parses (never invent dollars).
Desktop Print Preview path: click Print Preview prompt → Enter → go to LAST page for exact totals (visual read).
HARD RULE: Output Options = Excel prompt OR Print Preview prompt only — never click Printer.

howToGetInfo.database: Prefer sd_* / ODBC / Sensei when rows exist.
howToGetInfo.excel: Click Excel prompt → Enter → Setup (dates, provider 999) → keep SoftDent folder in Select File Name (never SoftDentReportExports) → NR2 copies to C:\SoftDentReportExports and parses XLS.
howToGetInfo.printPreview: Click Print Preview prompt → Enter → Setup if shown → go to LAST page for exact totals (visual read).

notes: All Phase-1 GUI master reports on v19.1.4 expose both Excel and Print Preview in Output Options.

sd_odbc_core.label: SoftDent ODBC / Sensei core tables
sd_odbc_core.why: Patient, procedure, payment, claim, appointment rows when ODBC/Sensei/sd_* are populated.

register.label: Register for a Period
register.why: Prefer Excel: click Excel then Enter; NR2 parses Productions/Collections/Ins Plan/Regular. Preview also available — click Print Preview then Enter; last page for totals.
nr2Uses: Ins/Patient split when SoftDent reports it

collections.label: Collection Reports — Summary
collections.why: Output Options offers Excel and Print Preview. Prefer Excel click→Enter for file ingest. For visual check: click Print Preview→Enter and read the LAST page for exact totals.
collections.guiMenuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Collection Reports → Summary
nr2Uses: Ins vs Patient when Register lacks split

transactions.label: Trans for a Period
transactions.why: Prefer Excel click→Enter when offered. Preview: click Print Preview→Enter; last page for totals.
transactions.dbNote: Try sd_* first for line detail; GUI Trans Period when DB lane cannot supply the period export NR2 expects.
transactions.guiMenuPath: Reports → Accounting → Trans for a Period

daysheet.label: Daysheet
daysheet.why: Verified Output Options include Excel + Print Preview. Prefer Excel; Preview last page for visual totals.

aging.label: Account Aging
aging.why: Verified Excel + Print Preview in Output Options. Prefer Excel; Preview last page for totals.

writeoff_totals.label: Writeoff Totals
writeoff_totals.why: Operator: Excel not available/usable — Print Preview only; read LAST page for InsCo×ADA Total/Allowed/Write-Offs.
writeoff_totals.guiMenuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Insurance Reports → Writeoff Totals

outstanding_claims_by_co.label: Outstanding Claims by Carrier (HAL-10580 bridge)
outstanding_claims_by_co.why: Bridge sd_claims by payer to Account Aging insurance/AR totals. Unnamed payers stay unnamed (empty ≠ $0). Promoted from phase2_reserved.
